title: nastanthus compactus
intro: Nastanthus compactus, also known as Dwarf Nasturtium, is a low-growing, annual plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The leaves and flowers of the Nastanthus compactus plant have been used to treat colds, flu, and sore throats due to their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, providing relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
